text: How should the painter of a liferaft which is fitted with hydrostatic release unit be secured to the ship?

options.text: Secured via weak link to a secured point on the ship
Secured to the part of hydrostatic release that is designed to break free
It should not be secured anyway
Directly to a secure point on the ship

explanation: The painter is the line that triggers the inflation of the raft; it must be connected via a weak link so the raft can break free if the ship sinks before the raft is manually released.
